title: anthoxanthum mexicanum
intro: Anthoxanthum mexicanum, also known as sweetgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the prairies and grasslands of Canada and the United States. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of anthoxanthum mexicanum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of sweetgrass can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, such as salves and oils, to harness its medicinal properties.
